title: Bloodlines and Old Hatred
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #5, King Harald, Zoro, Unknown person #6 as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The island's devolved into a pirate war zone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should we pull back or try to capture them?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What are your orders?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UWAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Marine Group location

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, Sengoku...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did you know about this crap?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think I recall someone alluding to it in a vague, rambling report once...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The guy up and vanished from Navy Life some time afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This doesn't feel like a dream...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They really did this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Rocks' location

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why ain't these guys dyin'?!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Xebec, put me down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We've got no choice but to run!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some of the others got caught up and transformed!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Wait, Xebec!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What Happened?! is it an ability?!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Pops!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GRANNY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What in the world?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He sure is strong.. it takes quite a long while...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: to regenerate from his sword slashes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But now we know he's also part of the day clan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Finishing him will please the great one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. The interruption to our journey has turned out to be a blessing!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Let me go, Xebec!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are you gonna try to fight them off one-handed?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't ya get it, Eris?! If anyone bearin' the DAYY name is caught...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll go through so much sufferin' it'll make hell look tame.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I know that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a full-fledged part of the DAYY clan now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone here was always so nice to me, even though I was a pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I fully understand the fate our clan faces!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Now put me down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I was the kind of woman who just clung to you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And couldn't protect a single child...

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
